name: Banana Layer Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add the shortening, 1/2 cup of mashed bananas, and eggs to the dry ingredients. Beat the mixture for 2 minutes at medium speed using an electric mixer.
3. Scrape down the sides of the bowl and beaters, then add the remaining 1/2 cup of mashed bananas and vanilla. Beat until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 8-inch round cake pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the pans and let cool on wire racks for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from pans completely and return layers to wire racks to cool.
8. Frost.
Banana Frosting:
1. Cream the margarine with an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add half of the confectioners sugar, lemon juice, and mashed bananas. Beat well.
3. Blend in the remaining confectioners sugar until fully incorporated.
